name: Yuze Zheng
shortIntro: I use photography to document wildlife, city life, light, color, and quiet moments around Chicago.
biography: Yuze Zheng is a photographer based in Chicago. His work focuses on wildlife, urban landscapes, street scenes, and the quiet visual details of everyday life.
This website is a place to collect and share photographs, field notes, and small observations from walks around the city and nearby natural spaces.
